audience: Owners of growing Sydney service businesses
problem: Every decision, follow-up and handover eventually returns to the owner
single_message: The owner should not have to perform five operational roles
desired_action: Message Run Lighter about an on-site automation review
selected_headline: Your business shouldn't need five of you
selected_hook: If every task returns to you, the business needs a better system
visual_concept: Five identical versions of founder Adrian simultaneously handling five different operational jobs
image_generation_prompt: Five versions of the same Australian business owner handling five different jobs in one Sydney service-business office
overlay_copy: Your business shouldn't need five of you
